name: Slackers - Carts of Glory
short_description: Step into the wonderful world of Slackers! Picture this: you and your friends run out of drinks and the store is closing! Hop in a shopping cart, the ultimate eco-friendly marvel, master the art of riding an unpredictable beast, discover shortcuts as you pave your path to glory!
detailed_description:
When the drinks stop flowing and the city store's closing its doors, who are you gonna call to save the day? Come roll with our crew of laid-back slackers, ready to turn chaos into glory, and possibly not into a disaster!!!

Welcome in the wonderful and crazy world of Slackers!
Race solo or with your friends in one of the most reckless downhill rides ever! Discover and master the unpredictable and unique movements of a shopping cart, find your shortcuts, collecting drinks along the way to satisfy your thirst, unlock all 16 shopping carts and push yourself to crazy speeds across 32 different tracks to reach the store before it closes!

Skateboards? No, shopping carts!
The new Freestyle mode is here to remind you that everything a skateboard can do… a shopping cart does worse. But with much more style. Trace your line, use every ramp and rail, perform trick after trick and rack up points. Each cap collected increases the multiplier: more risks, more style, more glory!

KEY CONCEPTS
Downhill Time Attack
- Live the dream of racing on a shopping cart at insane speed (without risks)
- If you're afraid to go alone, play with 3 friends online
- Collect drinks along the way to recharge your stamina
- The store is closing, better hurry!
Freestyle
- Perform breathtaking tricks and wild combos
- Collect caps to gain multipliers and boost your score
- Climb the global leaderboard
You don’t need to know what you’re doing. Just do it in style (more or less).

THINGS TO REMEMBER ONCE YOU'RE IN THE CART:

- First of all: I'ts not a car.
- The cart has no brakes. (deal with it)
- The cart has no engine. (push and sweat to move).
- The cart has no seatbelts. (we all know how it's going to end)
- The cart has no steering wheel (good luck in taming the beast)
- Last but not least: IT'S NOT A CAR.
You can do it!

supported_languages: English, French, Italian, German, Spanish - Spain, Portuguese - Brazil, Greek, Japanese, Korean, Russian, Simplified Chinese, Hindi
